name: chart-radar-dots
visual_summary: A radar chart displaying dot markers to represent data points, ideal for comparing multiple metrics across different categories in a clear and concise manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-dots
Description: A radar chart displaying dot markers to represent data points, ideal for comparing multiple metrics across different categories in a clear and concise manner.
Style: bright, modern, chart-focused
Interactions: clickable dots, hover effect
Tags: chart, radar, metric, comparison, data visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
